text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Everything is rooted in my daily training. The
lessons you've taught live within me and emerge
naturally when I run.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thus, while my soul is ablaze with the fire of
determination, my heart remains as fluid as
flowing water.
choice_data_list: Go show everyone what you've learned!
Go show everyone what you've learned!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes! My path is clear—here I come!
